title: Handmade improvised explosives annihilation and devastation tracked vehicle
abstract: The invention, which is the subject of the application, is related to the vehicle developed to prevent personnel losses in case of mutual position battles, situations in areas that cannot be entered in case of residential area combats, and in situations such as trapped handmade improvised explosives which are encountered in military missions and in culverts, cave drives, attack and defense combats.
claims: Claims 1. A handmade improvised explosives annihilation and devastation tracked vehicle characterized in that comprising; - a pallet (1 ) with an end pallet (1.1 ) at both ends, capable of moving in the up and down direction, at least 25 cm in length, which is the height required for stand-off distance and stair climbing dimension, - an armor piercing container (2) made of hard aluminum in square dimensions of 20 cm x 20 cm and having a thickness of at least 4 mm, in the form of a copper funnel having a cylinder volume, with a 100-degree angle and located inverted position. - a body of the vehicle (3) - a container with steel particles in the form of small lozenge slices - a GPS Module (7) - a battery and ignition block (5) - a drive camera (6) - a night vision camera (6.1 ) - an LED (8) and an antenna (10). 2. The vehicle body (3) of Claim 1 , characterized by comprising at least three retention latches (9) which are locked in engagement with each other.
